name: full-usb-success
note: Happy path: a clean full encrypted backup over USB. Assembled from the real idevicebackup2 output vocabulary captured in the lab (progress bars, 'Enforcing full backup from device.', 'Full backup mode.', 'Backup Successful.'); the lab's live Wi-Fi runs were fragmentary (repeated tears), so this is the canonical full-success reconstruction, not one verbatim capture. idevicebackup2 stdout carries no UDID/device-name/path, so nothing PII was present to scrub.
